item.title: Rep. Jimmy Gomez Posted
item.description: A video discussing a post shared by Jimmy Gomez and the surrounding conversation. The content focuses on the details and public reaction related to the post. What are your thoughts on the discussion?

item.title: The Keyboard Shortcut That Clears Your Screen

item.title: Fruit Stickers Are Made to Be Non-Toxic
item.description: Learn why the stickers used on fresh fruit are made with food-safe materials and what they're designed for if accidentally eaten.

media:content.media:description: Learn why the stickers used on fresh fruit are made with food-safe materials and what they're designed for if accidentally eaten.

item.title: You're Using Your Microwave the Wrong Way
item.description: Discover why placing food closer to the edge of the microwave turntable can help it heat more evenly than placing it in the center.

item.title: You're Supposed to Fold Coffee Filters
item.description: Discover why folding the edges of a coffee filter before brewing can help it fit better and stay securely in place.
